Luis Morón

Software Developer & AI Architect

Venezuela
leonelmoron@gmail.com

Software Developer & Solutions Architect. > Specialized in high-availability systems with Go and Generative AI. I transform technical complexity into efficient backend engines and real-impact automations.

More about me

20 years building the digital future

My journey began in 2006. Since then, I've evolved from the artisanal web to building ecosystems where AI and low-level code converge. My career is defined by independence as a freelancer and the creation of disruptive proprietary solutions.

Extreme technical domain: From VBA macros managing complex operational flows to Go bots that speak binary with WhatsApp directly via Whatsmeow.

Currently focused on scaling Corredor and Kasa's infrastructure, using edge architectures and AI orchestration.

50+
Projects Completed
20+
Years of Experience

What I bring to every project:

Backend with Go

Development of high-performance processing engines using Golang and Protobuf for brutal efficiency.

AI Architecture

Integration of Gemini 1.5 Flash for natural language interpretation and autonomous decision making.

Secure Infrastructure

Orchestration with Docker, Redis, and ZeroTier private networks for shielded production environments.

Real-time Data

Complex state management with Redis and robust persistence in PostgreSQL (Hasura) and MongoDB.

Experience

My professional journey in software development, combining technical expertise with leadership and teamwork.

IA Architect & Lead Developer

Corredor / Kasa
2024 - Present

Leading complex ecosystems: From Go automation and AI integration to scalable backend infrastructures and API Gateways.

Senior Freelance Software Engineer

Independiente
2013 - 2023

Specialized in modernization of management systems. Advanced relational database design and service-oriented architectures.

Full Stack Developer (Beginnings)

Freelance
2006 - 2012

Foundation in PHP, jQuery, and SQL. Development of management systems and efficiency-oriented websites.

Systems Engineering & Solutions

Robust architectures designed for scalability and operational efficiency.

Operations Core (Go)

Golang engine with Whatsmeow for native WhatsApp communication and Protobuf for extreme data efficiency.

AI Brain (Gemini 1.5 Flash)

Intelligent requirement interpretation and autonomous management of complex client interactions.

Backend Ecosystem (Kasa)

Architecture based on PostgreSQL 15+ with RLS security, automatic API via PostgREST, and real-time with Elixir.

Orchestration & Gateway

Service unification under Kong API Gateway, identity management with GoTrue, and persistence on ZeroTier Networks.
